case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CRAIG MABREY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100133777) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MABREY, CRAIG

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-25-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MABREY, CRAIG $18,082.52 PRINCIPAL, $437.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,519.52, SEE SCANNED DOC
